evals.expected_output: Selects the first 20 alphabetical files in pages/ that lack a ❓ tag, classifies each (Note/Quote/other), rebuilds frontmatter in the correct template field order, strips footnotes into authors/year/sources/publication/published/urls/reference, runs prettier, moves each to its destination folder (04 Permanent/ for Note, 03 Resources/Zitate/ for Quote, etc.), skips ambiguous notes with a ❓ tag instead of asking mid-batch, runs qmd update, and reports counts + moved/skipped lists.
Runs the full detection and transform-planning logic for 10 notes but makes no edits and no file moves; reports planned type, planned frontmatter changes, and planned destination for each note.

evals.prompt: Clean up the pages folder, do 5 at a time.
evals.expected_output: Treats this as 'process 5 notes' — same alphabetical, ❓-skip, footnote-parsing, prettier, move, and report workflow as the primary trigger.

Same as eval 1, plus: for any authors/related wikilink pointing to an existing but malformed Person/resource note, invokes obsidian-vault-add to fill it in while preserving existing info. Never creates notes for links that don't resolve to anything yet.
